notes: PR #609 (open, CI running): fixed a live-diagnosed bug found while investigating why a manual trigger hit safe_silence instead of posting a card. parseGeneratedPayload's discrepancy-engine branch (the format the retry prompt tells the model to prefer) never copied top-level reason down into artifact for schedule_block, so validateGeneratedArtifact's schedule_block reason is required check failed every attempt including the retry. This is exactly what blocked the 2026-07-05 commitment candidate #567/#606's live-verification is waiting on. Not yet merged/live-verified.
